title: Palala peltata
taxonomy: Palala peltata is classified within the genus Palala, which is a part of the family Araneidae. This classification places Palala peltata as a type of orb-web spider. More specifically, it falls under the order Araneomorphae and the class Arachnida. Further, it is part of the phylum Arthropoda, which encompasses a wide range of arthropod species. This classification highlights the unique position of Palala peltata within the arthropod kingdom.

Palala peltata is said to be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
